query:
SELECT cpc.id, c.name, cpc.designFeeAmount, cpc.designFeeMethod, cpc.designFeePercentage, cpc.status
FROM cpa_project_consultants cpc
LEFT JOIN consultants c ON cpc.consultantId = c.id
WHERE cpc.cpaProjectId = 300001
ORDER BY cpc.id
